title: SessionToken
description: Host-issued session token consumed by the signaling server to gate envelope relay (per `signaling-envelope.schema.json`). Minted on `JOIN_ROOM` and signed with the host's Ed25519 keypair (per `peer-identity.schema.json`); the joiner replays `sha256(canonicalJson(token))` on every outbound envelope. Authoritative doctrine: `docs/architecture/signaling-envelope.md` § 7. Token rate limits live in `docs/architecture/signaling-rate-limits.md` (Plan 29 scope).

tokenId.description: Lower-case UUID v4; unique per mint.

issuerPeerId.description: PeerId of the host that minted the token.

subjectPeerId.description: PeerId of the joiner the token was issued to.

exp.description: Expiry wall-clock, milliseconds since epoch. MUST satisfy `exp - iat <= 86400000` (24 h).

nonceWindow.description: Per-(signerId, tokenId) replay-window depth maintained by the signaling server. Must match the receiver's ring-buffer size in `signaling-envelope.md` § 4.

sig.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical-JSON encoding of `[schemaVersion, tokenId, roomCode, issuerPeerId, subjectPeerId, iat, exp, nonceWindow]`, signed with the issuer's keypair. Base64url-encoded, 64 raw bytes (86 url-safe chars without padding).
